tasks.title: Loyiha tuzilmasini yarat
tasks.why: 1-hafta yakuni: real loyiha quramiz. Avval tartibli papka (Day-1 ko'nikmasi).

tasks.title: Monitoring skripti yoz (bash)
tasks.why: Day-6 bash + Day-1/3 buyruqlar birga: server holatini ko'rsatuvchi skript.
steps: Ichида chiqarsin: hostname,  nproc (CPU),  df -h / | tail -1 (disk)

tasks.title: Skriptni bajariladigan qil
tasks.why: Day-2 ko'nikmasi: skript executable bo'lmasa ishlamaydi.

tasks.title: Loglardan xatolarni sana
tasks.why: Day-4 ko'nikmasi: logдан ERROR sonini ajratish.
steps: ERROR sonini yoz:  grep -c ERROR ~/devops/days/day-07/fixtures/app.log > health/logs/errors.txt

tasks.title: Ishga tushir va hisobotni saqla
tasks.why: Hammasini birlashtirish: skriptni ishga tushirib, natijani faylga saqlash.
tasks.expect: report.txt ichida hostname va tizim ma'lumotlari bor

tasks.title: 1-hafta xulosasi
steps: 1-haftada o'rgangan 3 ta eng muhim narsani (navigatsiya, ruxsat, jarayon, matn, tarmoq, bash'dan) ustozga ayt
